_provenance.MEASURED: blackwell/ada eff_tflops_prefill + eff_membw_decode_gbs (compute_microbench); mem_gb (nvidia-smi 97887/49140 MiB); interconnect ar_bw_gbs+decode_ar_overlap (graph_chain_ar_microbench); iso_ar_surface + ar_latency_us (ar_microbench cross-node, monotonized for the cost model); prefill_overlap (gemm probe); intra AR bw+latency (intra_calib, PCIe / no NVLink);
_provenance.PRIOR_documented: interconnect p2p (small PP-send, IB-class); step_floor_ms/c_mb_ms/c_chunk_ms (host-launch/dispatch floors — documented priors, regret-invariant, kernel-launch probe TODO); prefill_ar_overlap=0.8 (Megatron async-TP / sequence-parallel: cross-node TP AllReduce largely hidden under prefill GEMMs — LITERATURE prior, NOT measured NOT fit; graph_chain@prefill-batch measurement is a TODO).
_provenance.MODEL_dependence: overlap_eta is MODEL-dependent, measured on overlap_eta_model. All OTHER params are HARDWARE-only (fingerprint-cached). perf_planner._warn_eta_model warns when a different model is planned with the transferred eta.
_provenance.NOT_fit: No value fit to serving throughput; fit_planner.py retired. The former prefill_ar_overlap free-parameter fit (hw_params.json =0.8) is SUPERSEDED by the async-TP literature prior of like magnitude, now sourced from THIS file and labelled a prior.
_provenance._assembly_note: Assembled across a mode=default profiler run (compute/AR/surface/intra/prefill_overlap/dispatch) PLUS a separate manual decode-clean overlap_eta measurement. `hardware_profiler.py --mode thorough --model 70b` reproduces all of it in one run.
_provenance.overlap_eta_CAVEAT: overlap_eta=0.65 is an EFFECTIVE cost-model pipeline-efficiency param, NOT a direct overlap measurement: it is the eta that makes t_cycle reproduce the MEASURED 70B TP4PP2 decode itl (62.83ms, decode-clean run results/verify_pp_overlap_20260701_181807, roofline step_floor-consistent inversion). The fork's ACTUAL cross-stage PP overlap is 56-78% (direct torch-profiler trace analysis, separate). The roofline inversion is CONFOUNDED for comm-bound small models (8B TP4PP2 GPU time is ~90% NCCL AllReduce/PP SendRecv, not compute) — it returns 0 there, which is a measurement artifact, NOT 'no overlap'. Do NOT extrapolate this 70B scalar to small models; perf_planner._warn_eta_model flags cross-model use. Direct-trace overlap is the correct measure for small models.
